ItacAcademyItem.Name: Fileleuteri (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.EmblemDescription: Lion with before him a yoke he has broken in two
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Publications not in British Library collections, include: Dialogo dell`avveduto Accademico Phileleuthero (Venezia, Pinelli, 1622)
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
